zh.Kibblestone, Stafordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾吉波萊斯同
zh.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Chetwynd於大約1261年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾謝特德時，他的父親Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight33歲，母親Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE27歲。他和Joan De STAFFORD至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1354年在英國史洛普爾謝特德享年95歲。

zh-hans.Kibblestone, Stafordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾吉波萊斯同
zh-hans.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Chetwynd于大约1261年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾謝特德时，他的父亲Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight33岁，母亲Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE27岁。他和Joan De STAFFORD至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1354年在英国史洛普爾謝特德享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chetwynd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chatwin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place in Shropshire called Chetwynd, from the Old English personal name Ceatta + Old English (ge)wind ‘winding ascent’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Chetwynd was born about 1261, in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight, was 33 and his mother, Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Joan De STAFFORD. He died about 1354, in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Chetwynd est né environ 1261, à Chetwynd, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan De STAFFORD. Il est décédé environ 1354, à Chetwynd, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Chetwynd um 1261 in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight 33 und seine Mutter Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE 27. Er hatte mit Joan De STAFFORD mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1354 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Chetwynd è nato il circa 1261 nel Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joan De STAFFORD. Morì circa 1354, nel Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Chetwyndが約1261年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェトウインドで生まれた時，父Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knightは33歳，母Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTEREは27歳であった。彼はJoan De STAFFORDとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1354年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェトウインドで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Chetwynd(이)가 대략 1261년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쳇w이드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Joan De STAFFORD(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1354년 영국 슈럽실르 쳇w이드에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Chetwynd nasceu aproximadamente 1261, em Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joan De STAFFORD. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1354, em Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Chetwynd родился около 1261 г. в местности четвинд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan De STAFFORD. Он умер около 1354 г. в местности четвинд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Chetwynd nació aproximadamente 1261, en Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joan De STAFFORD. Murió aproximadamente 1354, en Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
